import httpx
from fastapi import FastAPI, Request

app = FastAPI()

@app.post("/api/enrich-users")
async def enrich_users(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    enriched = []
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        for user in body["users"]:
            profile = await client.get(f"https://profiles.example.com/{user['id']}")
            profile.raise_for_status()
            user["profile"] = profile.json()
            enriched.append(user)
    return {"users": enriched}

@app.post("/api/check-inventory")
async def check_inventory(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    results = []
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        for sku in body["skus"]:
            resp = await client.get(f"https://inventory.example.com/stock/{sku}")
            resp.raise_for_status()
            results.append(resp.json())
    return {"stock": results}

@app.post("/api/send-notifications")
async def send_notifications(request: Request):
    body = await request.json()
    async with httpx.AsyncClient() as client:
        for recipient in body["recipients"]:
            await client.post(
                "https://notifications.example.com/send",
                json={"to": recipient, "message": body["message"]},
            )
    return {"sent": len(body["recipients"])}
